criterion: Need all years plus all four seasons represented.
recommended_action: Broaden or fix window plan if any years/seasons are missing.
Ensure pooled all-years window ran and was collected.

criterion: AI systems should beat HRES in most z500 windows.
recommended_action: Keep claims comparative if the favorable share is only moderate.

criterion: A stronger paper should show where the advantage appears across lead time.
recommended_action: Use only long-lead claims if leadwise summaries are unavailable.

criterion: No window should collapse into tiny regimes.
recommended_action: Keep regime claims soft if some windows are very imbalanced.

criterion: Entropy is a useful complement to min/max regime share.
Blocked cases should usually be harder than unblocked cases.
recommended_action: If penalties are weak, keep blocked-flow claims descriptive rather than sweeping.

criterion: Dense lead support strengthens the case that the ranking is not an artifact of sparse checkpoints.
recommended_action: Keep the dense-lead figure in the appendix if only sparse leads are available.
